attributes.additional_details:
There has been multiple car accidents and pets being killed on this high speed road (60mp) coming into Wheathampstead
Id like to request the speed limited be changed and permanent speed cameras put in place as this is a highly fast and dangerous road

My poor cat reggie was hit and killed on this road yesterday by a speeding car and didnt stop. In his memory if I could influence road safety measures on the marford road that would honor him and hopefully prevent further road kills/car accidents
attributes.background:
regards to a dangerous main road ( marford road ) in Wheathampstead, Hertfordshire

There has been multiple car accidents and pets being killed on this high speed road (60mp) coming into Wheathampstead
Id like to request the speed limited be changed and permanent speed cameras put in place

rejection.details:
We can’t accept petitions that call for action at a local level.

You could ask your MP to take action on your concerns about this issue, including by asking them to present a public (paper) petition about this.

You can find contact details for your local MP here: https://members.parliament.uk/FindYourMP

You could also raise your issue with a local councillor who represents you. You can use this page to find out who your local councillors are, and how to contact them: https://www.gov.uk/find-your-local-councillors
